## Source: amazon-inspector (1a4eacdccf8a177ac402bd5896b3033df07685cd3e951476d1e28e341e8e74b4)
The package merchservicingnodeserv was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7ee347e38b4b427d71e577103af164a2111d865d38796640be840888cfa0b39d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'merchservicingnodeserv' @ 99.13.9 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
